description: Build & manage Genudo AI agents for any messaging channel — pipelines, integrations, knowledge.
name: io.github.genudo-ai/genudo_mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Genudo token (Settings → API Keys), sent as a Bearer token.
environmentVariables.name: GENUDO_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for self-hosted Genudo instances. Defaults to https://api.genudo.ai.
environmentVariables.name: GENUDO_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to allow self-signed certificates (local development only).
environmentVariables.name: GENUDO_ALLOW_INSECURE_SSL

title: Genudo
